$comment: Representative MCP tool invocations per tool family (manifest category). Surfaces agent-friendly examples through agda_tools_catalog so callers can plan multi-step workflows without reading source. Validated at module load via Zod; format change must be matched by src/tools/tool-family-examples.ts.

session.summary: Load a file to start the interactive session.
session.note: After this call, agda_session_status returns the live goal IDs.

session.summary: Inspect the current session phase and available goal IDs.
session.note: Cheap to call between operations to confirm the session is healthy.

proof.summary: Split a goal on a variable and write the new clauses back.
proof.note: Set writeToFile=false to preview without modifying the source.

proof.summary: Fill a goal with a candidate term.
Ask Agda to find a term for the goal automatically.

navigation.summary: Search loaded modules for definitions matching a query.
List the names exported by a module (top-level or visible from a goal).
Audit a file for postulate declarations.

process.summary: Report the underlying Agda binary version.
Abort the in-flight Agda command without restarting the session.

highlighting.summary: Fetch syntax-highlighting + token-class information for a loaded file.

backend.summary: Compile a loaded module through a chosen backend.

analysis.summary: Inspect a goal's expected type, locals, and useful suggestions.

reporting.summary: List all exposed MCP tools, categories, schemas, and worked examples.
reporting.note: Recommended first call for an agent that hasn't seen this server before.

reporting.summary: Report which IOTCM commands are end-to-end vs. mapped vs. known gaps, plus the supported-Agda range.
Produce a stable bug-report payload (with fingerprint) for a failing tool call.

args.observed: load reported zero goals on a file with two holes
